message:
feat(freeze): Add C code builder infrastructure (Phase 1)

Implement structured C code generation to replace raw string concatenation
in codegen_ssa.zig. This eliminates brace-matching bugs and provides type-safe
code building with RAII cleanup.

Core types added:
- CValue: Typed C expression wrapper with fluent API (cast, deref, field, arrow, index, call)
- CBlock: RAII-style block manager that auto-closes braces
- CBuilder: High-level code generation API with indentation and language awareness
- CodeGenContext: Execution mode abstraction (trampoline vs non-trampoline)

Features:
- Automatic brace balancing via RAII (no more forgotten closing braces)
- Context-aware variable names (stack/frame->stack, locals/frame->locals, sp/frame->sp)
- Helper methods for common patterns (if/while/for/switch blocks, exception checks, stack ops)
- Supports both C and Zig output languages
- Comprehensive unit tests (20 tests, all passing, no memory leaks)

Next: Integrate with SSACodeGen and migrate opcodes to use builder API.

Part of the plan to reduce codegen_ssa.zig from 4,105 lines to ~2,000 lines
while eliminating double-brace bugs and improving maintainability.
